speaker: charlie
text: Right, sports fans, we've got some cracking news from the athletics world. Nina Kennedy has claimed her fifth national pole vault title, securing her spot on Australia's Commonwealth Games team. Her coach James Fitzpatrick is already focused on helping her go back-to-back on the world stage.

speaker: alice
text: That's brilliant Alex. And for all the rugby league fans out there, there's NRL action tonight at Suncorp Stadium with gates opening at half past six and kickoff at five past eight. Nothing beats Friday night footy under the lights in Brisbane.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right Jamie. And down at the MCG, there's AFL action with Richmond taking on Melbourne tonight as well. It's a great night to be a sports fan in Australia, that's for sure.
